subcodes.first_line: O Thou All-Forgiving, All-Loving and All-Knowing One! Make Thy handmaiden Ṭúbá radiant with light and cause her to soar in the infinite heights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غفور ودود و دانا امه الله طوبی را نورا فرما و در اوج بی پایان پرواز ده و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
